title: Two Cents Worth of Hope
writer: Renato Castellani, Titina De Filippo, Ettore Maria Margadonna
actors: Maria Fiore, Vincenzo Musolino, Filomena Russo
plot: A love story between a poor fellow and a daughter of respected workshop owner set in an Italian post-war village.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award5 wins & 1 nomination total
